english: Salutations to Ramachandra, salutations to Ramabhadra
Salutations to Raghunatha the lord, husband of Sita
Rama son of Dasharatha, pure, destroyer of all sins
roman: Ramam Dasharathim shuddham sarva papa pranashanam

english: The great hero king of Kosala, the excellent one holding the bow
Dark-hued, beautiful, peaceful, the Lord bearing bow and arrows
roman: Shyamalam sundaram shantam dhurba na dharam prabhum

english: The beloved of Janaki, Rama the destroyer of Ravana, the Lord
roman: Janaki vallabham Ramam Ravana antakam Ishvaram

hindi: रामाष्टकमिदं पुण्यं भक्त्या यः पठते नरः।
english: This sacred Rama Ashtakam — whoever reads it with devotion
roman: Rama ashtakam idam punyam bhaktya yah pathate narah

english: Always attains Ayodhya by the grace of Raghava
